free_text: Charge distribution in the mass region 128-134 in low
energy fission of actinides
Swimming pool type research reactor,
APSARA
Electrodeposited target of 233U (100 ug), 235U
(4 ug) have been prepared on 1 mm platinum planchet.
80 c.c. HPge detector connected to a PC based
4K channel analyzer.
Resolution of the detector system was 1.8 keV at 1332
keV of 60Co.
Collection of fission products using
recoil catcher technique, Radiochemical separation of
iodine, gamma ray spectrometric analysis of
unseparated fission products and separated iodine
sample.
From the photo-peak areas of the gamma rays of 128Sn,
132Te and 134Te their cumulative yields were
determined using decay equation.
The independent yield of 132I was determined from its
photo-peak area in the separated using decay-growth
equation.
Decay data were taken from the Tbl.1 of RCA,62,1,1993
The error in the CY of 128Sn, 132Te, 134Te
and IY of 132I is precissional error due to replicate
measurement.
Compiled by H.Naik, S.V.Suryanarayana,
S.Taova, Paresh Prajapati
On. SAMPLE: Free text corrected.
